evidence: "Will and the rest of the cast are just down right hilarious. I love this movie for just pure fun."
"Hard to believe at times, but the characters are still captivating."
"Always great television. Even though the characters change, the writers and actors keep it real."
"Great script and acting. Never grows old"
"Some of the greatest TV ever made in my opinion. Showed cops like they used to be, that is they cared about people."
"Reminds of how police used to really serve and protect."
"Some of the greatest TV ever made in my opinion."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and drama, particularly enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They exhibit loyalty to the NYPD franchise and appreciate content that resonates emotionally, often reflecting on the portrayal of characters and their depth.
